name: Green Beans Oregano
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz.) French cut green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 6 to 8 minutes or until beans are done.
4. Garnish with lemon wedges.
5. Serves 4.
